I started 20 days ago and I will say the game is pretty beginner friendly in the sense that you're allowed to make mistakes and it doesn't really matter too much. The big rule would be to not spend silver on standard pulls and ask here before using limited pulls. 
There is also a nice command you can use
like when you first roll
+guides

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:


[Morimens Glossary](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417237861412896859) by Mythag University
[Game Mechanics](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417994340177022981) by Mythag University
[Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University
[Damage Formula](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1384463374213189652) by Jynn              
[How To Aliemus 101 & 102](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1387172781829128304) by Jynn
i think it sorta, like, makes them vulnerable, basically more dps i think

1. At the start of the game you are offered a banner you can pull in for a standard SSR and infinitely reroll… the standards in this game are very essy to come by so you can reasonably just pick a favourite and have all the relevant ones before long anyway
2. You’ll probably notice that when picking a language English will be marked as “GPT beta” at this points that’s a half truth, most of the main story is translated, only really missing 1-2 later game chapters  and a few of the more filler side stories but even then those are fine, the rest is human translated
3. Pity carries over in 99% of banners so pull away
4. on the subject of pulls there are four limited characters on banner right now, Mouchette/Doresian/Daffodill/Miryam; Doresian and Daffodill are ehh… not great DPS nowadays lets just say <:Feelguilty:1400771618174664775> Mouchette on the other hand is very competent and even better with duplicates, you even get a free one with the compketion of chapter one, besides the free one two/three more copies is ideal, Miryam is the other character, One copy is just nice to have overall, although she is mainly used in one team, if you ever play said team you’ll be gratefull to have her
5. I kinda skimmed over this in my last point, but the game is semi dupe reliant so don’t be afraid of having to pull several copies
6. Don’t ignore the R ratrity wheels they are extremely powerfull Arc 1, possibly stronger than a lot of SSRs
7. this was a lot and mainly freestyled so just tell me if there’s something you don’t understand; and just have fun, games are meant to be enjoyed after all
